'''鈭歜-h-g''' ('''bahag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:break|break]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:break|break]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-h-g
|-
! Lemma
| bahag
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahagithi|bahagithi]] || [[word:bahagiji|bahagiji]] || [[word:bahagishi|bahagishi]] || [[word:bahagi|bahagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahaguthuth|bahaguthuth]] || [[word:bahagujuj|bahagujuj]] || [[word:bahagushush|bahagushush]] || [[word:bahag|bahag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahaguthu|bahaguthu]] || [[word:bahaguju|bahaguju]] || [[word:bahagushu|bahagushu]] || [[word:bahagu|bahagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahagufuth|bahagufuth]] || [[word:bahagufuj|bahagufuj]] || [[word:bahagufush|bahagufush]] || [[word:bahaguf|bahaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahagethe|bahagethe]] || [[word:bahageje|bahageje]] || [[word:bahageshe|bahageshe]] || [[word:bahage|bahage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahagothoth|bahagothoth]] || [[word:bahagojoj|bahagojoj]] || [[word:bahagoshosh|bahagoshosh]] || [[word:bahag|bahag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahagotho|bahagotho]] || [[word:bahagojo|bahagojo]] || [[word:bahagosho|bahagosho]] || [[word:bahago|bahago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahagofoth|bahagofoth]] || [[word:bahagofoj|bahagofoj]] || [[word:bahagofosh|bahagofosh]] || [[word:bahagof|bahagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bahag忙th忙|bahag忙th忙]] || [[word:bahag忙j忙|bahag忙j忙]] || [[word:bahag忙sh忙|bahag忙sh忙]] || [[word:bahag忙|bahag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahagathath|bahagathath]] || [[word:bahagajaj|bahagajaj]] || [[word:bahagashash|bahagashash]] || [[word:bahag|bahag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahagatha|bahagatha]] || [[word:bahagaja|bahagaja]] || [[word:bahagasha|bahagasha]] || [[word:bahaga|bahaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahagafath|bahagafath]] || [[word:bahagafaj|bahagafaj]] || [[word:bahagafash|bahagafash]] || [[word:bahagaf|bahagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bahagasha|bahagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobahagasha|gobahagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibahagasha|gokibahagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bahagn眉sha|bahagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobahagnkn眉sha|gobahagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibahagn眉sha|gokibahagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bahagsh毛sha|bahagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobahagnksh毛sha|gobahagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibahagsh毛sha|gokibahagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahagrosha|bahagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahagnkrosha|gobahagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahagrosha|gokibahagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bahagmusha|bahagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahagnkmusha|gobahagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahagmusha|gokibahagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bahagsherasha|bahagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobahagnksherasha|gobahagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibahagsherasha|gokibahagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bahagngasha|bahagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobahagnkngasha|gobahagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibahagngasha|gokibahagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bahagyasha|bahagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobahagnkyasha|gobahagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibahagyasha|gokibahagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bahagyamasha|bahagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobahagnkyamasha|gobahagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibahagyamasha|gokibahagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahagn眉sh毛sha|bahagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahagnkn眉sh毛sha|gobahagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahagn眉sh毛sha|gokibahagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahagn眉rosha|bahagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahagnkn眉rosha|gobahagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahagn眉rosha|gokibahagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahagn眉musha|bahagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahagnkn眉musha|gobahagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahagn眉musha|gokibahagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahagsh毛n眉sha|bahagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahagnksh毛n眉sha|gobahagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahagsh毛n眉sha|gokibahagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahagsh毛rosha|bahagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahagnksh毛rosha|gobahagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahagsh毛rosha|gokibahagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahagsh毛musha|bahagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahagnksh毛musha|gobahagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahagsh毛musha|gokibahagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahagron眉sha|bahagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahagnkron眉sha|gobahagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahagron眉sha|gokibahagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahagrosh毛sha|bahagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahagnkrosh毛sha|gobahagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahagrosh毛sha|gokibahagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bahagromusha|bahagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobahagnkromusha|gobahagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibahagromusha|gokibahagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bahagmun眉sha|bahagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobahagnkmun眉sha|gobahagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibahagmun眉sha|gokibahagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bahagmush毛sha|bahagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobahagnkmush毛sha|gobahagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibahagmush毛sha|gokibahagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bahagmurosha|bahagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobahagnkmurosha|gobahagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibahagmurosha|gokibahagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bahag|bahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙h忙g|b忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobahag|hobahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙h忙g|hob忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobahag|hohobahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙h忙g|hohob忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bahag|n眉bahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙h忙g|n眉b忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bahag|n眉n眉bahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙h忙g|n眉n眉b忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bahag|n茂bahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙h忙g|n茂b忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bahag|n茂n茂bahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙h忙g|n茂n茂b忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubahag|lubahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙h忙g|lub忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubahag|lulubahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙h忙g|lulub忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libahag|libahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙h忙g|lib忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibahag|lilibahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙h忙g|lilib忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobahag|kobahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙h忙g|kob忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobahag|kokobahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙h忙g|kokob忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebahag|kebahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙h忙g|keb忙h忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebahag|kekebahag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙h忙g|kekeb忙h忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
